name: Hydrabeam 4000 rgbw
comment:
Cameo Hydrabeam 4000 rgbw: Display -> FOH / Set 42 Dec8 Pan-Offset per Head
The Cameo Hydrabeam 4000 features four individually controllable moving heads on a 100 cm (3.28 ft.) bar with ultra fast 540° pan and 270° tilt. They are equipped with powerful 32 W quad LEDs for brilliant, uniform colour mixes and project razor sharp beams with an extremely focused 2.5° spread.
